title: EPP troublemaker backs Orbán over party colleague in Hungarian election
summary_full: Slovenian lawmaker Branko Grims has publicly supported Orbán over Péter Magyar, whose Tisza party sits with Grim's parliamentary group
summary_public: Slovenian lawmaker Branko Grims has publicly supported Orbán over Péter Magyar, whose Tisza party sits with Grim's parliamentary group

HU.label: negative
HU.evidence: backs Orbán over party colleague in Hungarian election
